hero.title: RESTORE YOUR HAIR at EUGENIX BHUBANESWAR
hero.description:
Regrow Your Hair. Restore Your Youth. Revive Your Self-esteem! At Eugenix, we have perfected the art of Hair Restoration owing to
two decades of research and innovation. Our revolutionary DHT Technique gives you a premium and satisfactory Hair Transplant experience.

items.title: Consultation
items.description: The first crucial step is a comprehensive consultation with a qualified hair restoration expert. The counselor, with the help of a hair transplant surgeon, will assess your scalp to determine the grade of baldness, the extent of hair loss and the potential donor area.

items.title: Hairline Design
items.description: Based on the evaluation and your desired outcome, the surgeon will create a personalized treatment plan that goes beyond just the number of grafts. This plan incorporates factors like your facial features, existing hair pattern, scalp laxity & desired hairline style.

items.title: Extraction
items.description: Direct Hair Transplant (DHT) utilizes a specialized method that minimizes trauma to the scalp. This ensures healthy grafts with a higher survival rate, ultimately leading to a denser, more natural-looking head of hair.

items.title: Implanting Grafts
items.description: Extracted grafts bypass storage solutions, which can potentially compromise their viability. DHT prioritizes immediate implantation into the recipient area, maximizing the number of healthy follicles that thrive in their new location.

items.title: After-care
items.description: Following the procedure, the scalp may experience some swelling and tenderness, which typically subside within a few days. The Post-surgery care team will provide detailed post-operative instructions to promote healing and optimize graft survival.

items.title: Hair Transplant In Male
items.description:
After transforming 18,000+ male patients, we have gained paramount experience in the domain. We have pioneered the latest DHT technique to ensure the utmost efficacy in the cases.

Who Are The Ideal Candidates For Male Hair Transplant?

When it comes to hair transplant surgery, there is no fixed age for undergoing it. However, we would like to say that 25 years is considered the right age because hair loss starts to stabilize at this age. But this doesn’t mean people below the age of 25 are not ideal candidates for transplantation. An individual who is 70-100% bald is considered a good candidate for hair transplantation.

Why Avail Hair Transplant Surgery At Eugenix Hair Sciences?

  • First To Introduce Cutting Edge DHT Methodology To The World
  • Implanted More Than 5,04,00,000 Grafts
  • Treated 1,800+ Cases Of Grade 6/7 Baldness
  • Almost 100% Success Rate
  • 20,000+ Patients Have Been Transformed
  • 30+ Years of Combined Experience

items.title: Hairline Reconstruction
items.description:
At Eugenix, we call it the hairline zone and we very well understand how vigilantly a hairline zone must be treated. Understanding every possible minute detail, we have provided all our patients, with the utmost natural-looking hairlines.

Who Are The Ideal Candidates For Hairline Reconstruction?

  • Hairline too high
  • Doubles and triples in the Hairline
  • Norwood Scale 2 & 3
  • Adding density in the pre-existing Hairline

Why Avail Hair Transplant Surgery At Eugenix Hair Sciences?

  • Led By World Renowned Dr Arika Bansal & Dr Pradeep Sethi
  • First To Introduce Cutting Edge DHT Methodology To The World
  • Implanted More Than 5,04,00,000 Grafts
  • 20,000+ Patients Have Been Transformed
  • Treated 1,800+ Cases Of Grade 6/7 Baldness
  • 30+ Years of Combined Experience
  • Almost 100% Success Rate

items.title: Eyebrow Reconstruction
items.description:
The aesthetics of the face are very well understood by our expert surgeons. Not just beard, but we have provided our male and female patients with eyebrow reconstruction as well and they all were elated to see their transformation.

Who Are The Ideal Candidates For Eyebrow Reconstruction?

  • Thin Eyebrow
  • Aging
  • Over-Plucking of Eyebrows in Women
  • Burns & Trauma
  • Alopecia Areata
  • Post Cancer Treatment

items.title: Moustache & Beard Hair Transplant
items.description:
We have gained expertise in body hair transplant over these years. Our male patients confidently sport beards and flaunt dense moustaches through our services.

Who Are The Ideal Candidates For Moustache & Beard Hair Transplant?

The ideal candidates for a beard transplant are those with patchy beard loss rather than those requiring complete reconstruction. We prefer using beard grafts for beard transplants, as scalp hair tends to grow at a faster rate.

Why Avail Hair Transplant Surgery At Eugenix Hair Sciences?

  • Led By World Renowned Dr Arika Bansal & Dr Pradeep Sethi
  • First To Introduce Cutting Edge DHT Methodology To The World
  • Implanted More Than 5,04,00,000 Grafts
  • 20,000+ Patients Have Been Transformed
  • Treated 1,800+ Cases Of Grade 6/7 Baldness
  • 30+ Years of Combined Experience
  • Almost 100% Success Rate

items.title: Corrective Hair Transplant
items.description:
Our co-founder Dr Pradeep Sethi personally believes that those who visit us for corrective cases deserve the highest levels of attention and care. Incidentally nearly 40-50 patients come to us every month for corrections. Often in their previous transplants at other clinics, doubles or triples are carelessly implanted in the hairline zone. Their hair transplant become so unnatural that they wish to look bald instead of sporting the unnatural look from a botched job. But, with corrective measures and taking out those grafts, we make sure to minimise the damage to as few grafts as possible. We wish that one never requires corrective surgery, but in case you require one to fix a failed hair transplant, we have the expertise to set it right.

Who Are The Ideal Candidates For Corrective Hair Transplant?

  • Candidates With Unnatural Hairline Position
  • Lack of Density
  • Hairline is Too Low
  • Hair Growth at Wrong Angles & Directions
  • Poor Scarring
  • Donor Farming

Why Avail Hair Transplant Surgery At Corrective Hair Transplant?

  • Led By World Renowned Dr Arika Bansal & Dr Pradeep Sethi
  • First To Introduce Cutting Edge DHT Methodology To The World
  • Implanted More Than 5,04,00,000 Grafts

  • 30+ Years of Combined Experience
  • Almost 100% Success Rate

items.question: How do I choose the right clinic in Bhubaneswar?
items.answer: Choose a reputable clinic with certified, experienced doctors or surgeons. Look for positive patient reviews on platforms like Google and ensure the clinic offers a clear, detailed explanation of their hair restoration treatments. It’s crucial to schedule an in-person consultation to discuss your specific needs and understand the clinic’s approach.

items.question: How do I find the best hair transplant surgeon in Bhubaneswar?
items.answer: Research several surgeons by reviewing their credentials, experience, and genuine patient testimonials. It’s also important to examine before-and-after photos of their recent procedures to assess their expertise and results.

items.question: What is the cost of a hair transplant in Bhubaneswar?
items.answer: The cost varies based on the technology used, the number of grafts required, and the clinic’s reputation. For an accurate quote, consult directly with the clinic.

items.question: What services are offered at your clinic in Bhubaneswar?
items.answer: Our clinic provides a variety of services, including hair transplants, PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) therapy, hair loss consultations, and scalp treatments. We offer comprehensive hair care solutions using both surgical and non-surgical methods.

items.question: How do I book an appointment at your clinic in Bhubaneswar?
items.answer: To book an appointment, contact us via phone, WhatsApp, email, or through our website. Our team will help you schedule a consultation at your convenience.
